mapper.select:
SELECT tradeDate, #{sectorType} AS sectorType, #{sectorCode} AS sectorCode, margin_balance AS marginBalance, short_balance AS shortBalance, total_balance AS totalBalance, margin_balance - LAG(margin_balance) OVER (ORDER BY tradeDate) AS marginBalanceChange, short_balance - LAG(short_balance) OVER (ORDER BY tradeDate) AS shortBalanceChange, total_balance - LAG(total_balance) OVER (ORDER BY tradeDate) AS totalBalanceChange FROM ( SELECT m.trade_date AS tradeDate, SUM(m.margin_balance) AS margin_balance, SUM(m.short_balance) AS short_balance, SUM(m.total_balance) AS total_balance FROM margin_daily m INNER JOIN
stock_industry stock_concept s ON m.stock_code = s.stock_code AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE s.
industry_code concept_code = #{sectorCode} AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.trade_date >= #{startDate} AND m.trade_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY m.trade_date ) sub ORDER BY tradeDate
